title: CloudZero Insight
description: Represents a cost insight for tracking cost anomalies and patterns within CloudZero.

description.description: Description of what the insight tracks.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the insight was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the insight was last updated.

filters.description: Filters applied to the insight for narrowing cost data.

group_by.description: Dimensions used for grouping cost data within the insight.
